title: Buyer Ambition Data — Intent Targeting | CAPXEL | CAPXEL
content: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceKnow Who's Ready to Buy — Before They DoClient-specific intent data, refreshed weekly, enriched with full identity profiles. Stop targeting demographics. Start targeting buyers.Talk to Our TeamSee All ProductsThe iceberg is real: most signal is hidden beneath the surface.The Problem With Intent DataEveryone Else Is Selling You Recycled AudiencesMost intent data providers run shared pools. Every client gets the same stale list of "interested" buyers — your competitor included. By the time you reach them, they've already been bombarded by everyone else using the same data.CAPXEL does it differently.What Makes Our Intent Data DifferentWhite-glove intelligence, not self-serve guesswork.Client-Specific AudiencesYour data is yours. We don't recycle audience pools across clients. Every delivery is built exclusively for your brand, your market, your goals.7-Day Fresh IdentitiesEvery weekly delivery contains people who have shown purchase intent in the past seven days. No stale data. No recycled lists. Active buyers only.Full Identity EnrichmentEvery identity comes with verified emails and mobile advertising IDs — enabling cross-device targeting across Meta, Google, programmatic, email, and direct mail.Precision Geo-TargetingNationwide, by state, by county, or hyper-local. Need buyers searching for gutter services in a specific metro? We can do that. Any vertical. Any region.Continuously RefinedWe don't set it and forget it. Using INSPEX intelligence and market sentiment analysis, we constantly refine your targeting to maximize conversion impact.B2B & B2C, All VerticalsConsumer brands, SaaS, professional services, local businesses — our intent data covers every vertical with custom aggregation for qualifying clients.How It WorksIntelligence in. Buyers out. Every week.01Intelligence IngestionWe analyze your brand, your INSPEX customer data, and market sentiment to define the exact buyer ambition verticals that will drive the highest conversion impact.02Custom Audience BuildWe source fresh, high-intent identities — people actively searching for what you sell in the past 7 days — enriched with full contact data and advertising IDs.03Weekly Delivery & RefinementYour data is delivered weekly via secure CSV. Load it directly into Meta, Google, or any ad platform. We review performance and refine targeting every cycle.Precision Targeting, Any MarketFrom product-level to brand-level. Local to nationwide. We customize the data to fit.E-Commerce BrandA supplement brand receives weekly audiences of people actively researching protein powder — enriched with emails, ad IDs, income data, and purchase behavior. Loaded directly into Meta custom audiences and email sequences. Cost per acquisition drops. ROAS compounds.Local Service BusinessA home services company targets people searching for gutter repair in their metro area. Weekly fresh audiences, geo-targeted to their service radius. Every ad dollar hits someone who's already looking. The data pays for itself in the first week.White-Glove Data ConsultancyStop Guessing. Start Targeting Buyers.The more you invest in reaching the right audience, the faster the data compounds your results. Let's build your first custom audience.Talk to Our TeamExplore INSPEXFAQEverything you need to know about Buyer Ambition Data.What is Buyer Ambition Data?How is this different from other intent data providers?What verticals does this work for?How is the data delivered?Can I target specific geographic areas?Who is Buyer Ambition Data designed for?
summary: CAPXEL — AI-Native Consumer IntelligenceKnow Who's Ready to Buy — Before They DoClient-specific intent data, refreshed weekly, enriched with full identity profiles. Stop targeting demographics.
